messages.content: Cada lunes a las 9am envíame un resumen de mis emails no leídos

Voy a crear un workflow automático para esto.
<tool_call>{"name": "create_workflow", "arguments": {"name": "email-monday-summary", "trigger": {"type": "schedule", "cron": "0 9 * * 1", "timezone": "Europe/Madrid"}, "nodes": [{"type": "read_email", "filter": "unread", "limit": 50}, {"type": "ai_process", "prompt": "Summarize emails in bullet points"}, {"type": "send_notification", "title": "📧 Resumen del lunes"}]}}</tool_call>
✅ Workflow creado. Cada lunes a las 9:00 recibirás el resumen de emails.
Avísame cuando alguien descargue un archivo en mi carpeta Descargas

Configuro un vigilante de archivos para ~/Downloads.
<tool_call>{"name": "create_workflow", "arguments": {"name": "downloads-watcher", "trigger": {"type": "file_watch", "path": "~/Downloads", "events": ["create"], "recursive": false}, "nodes": [{"type": "send_notification", "title": "📥 Nuevo archivo: {{trigger.filename}}", "message": "Tamaño: {{trigger.file_size}}", "urgency": "normal"}]}}</tool_call>
✅ Vigilante activado. Te notificaré cada vez que aparezca un archivo nuevo en ~/Downloads.
Haz un backup de mis documentos cada noche

Creo un workflow de backup nocturno programado.
<tool_call>{"name": "create_workflow", "arguments": {"name": "nightly-backup", "trigger": {"type": "schedule", "cron": "0 23 * * *", "timezone": "Europe/Madrid"}, "nodes": [{"type": "exec_command", "command": "tar -czf ~/Backups/docs_$(date +%Y%m%d).tar.gz ~/Documents"}, {"type": "exec_command", "command": "find ~/Backups -name 'docs_*.tar.gz' -mtime +30 -delete"}, {"type": "send_notification", "title": "💾 Backup completado"}]}}</tool_call>
✅ Backup nocturno configurado para las 23:00. Los backups con más de 30 días se eliminan automáticamente.
Cuando detectes que una URL que visito es de phishing, bloquéala

Configuro vigilancia de URLs con bloqueo automático.
<tool_call>{"name": "create_workflow", "arguments": {"name": "phishing-blocker", "trigger": {"type": "event", "event": "browser.navigation"}, "nodes": [{"type": "scan_url", "url": "{{trigger.url}}"}, {"type": "filter", "conditions": [{"field": "{{scan_result.is_phishing}}", "op": "eq", "value": true}], "next_if_true": "block", "next_if_false": "allow"}, {"id": "block", "type": "exec_command", "command": "echo '{{trigger.domain}}' >> /etc/hosts.blocked"}, {"type": "send_notification", "title": "🚨 URL bloqueada", "urgency": "critical"}]}}</tool_call>
✅ Sistema de bloqueo activo. Las URLs de phishing se bloquearán automáticamente y recibirás alerta.
Create a workflow that monitors my server CPU and alerts me if it exceeds 90%

Setting up CPU monitoring workflow.
<tool_call>{"name": "create_workflow", "arguments": {"name": "cpu-monitor", "trigger": {"type": "schedule", "cron": "*/5 * * * *"}, "nodes": [{"type": "exec_command", "command": "top -bn1 | grep 'Cpu(s)' | awk '{print $2}' | cut -d'%' -f1", "output_var": "cpu_usage"}, {"type": "filter", "conditions": [{"field": "{{cpu_usage}}", "op": "gte", "value": 90}], "next_if_true": "alert", "next_if_false": "silent"}, {"id": "alert", "type": "send_notification", "title": "🔥 CPU at {{cpu_usage}}%", "urgency": "critical"}]}}</tool_call>
✅ CPU monitor created — checks every 5 minutes, alerts when ≥90%.
Automatiza: cada domingo a las 2am escanea el sistema en busca de malware

Programo escaneo de seguridad semanal.
<tool_call>{"name": "create_workflow", "arguments": {"name": "weekly-security-scan", "trigger": {"type": "schedule", "cron": "0 2 * * 0", "timezone": "Europe/Madrid"}, "nodes": [{"type": "exec_command", "command": "clamscan -r ~/Downloads --infected --log=/tmp/scan.txt", "timeout": 300}, {"type": "exec_command", "command": "clamscan ~/Documents ~/Desktop --infected", "timeout": 600}, {"type": "ai_process", "prompt": "Analyze scan results and generate security report"}, {"type": "write_file", "path": "~/Reports/security_{{date}}.md"}, {"type": "send_notification", "title": "🛡️ Escaneo completado"}]}}</tool_call>
✅ Escaneo de seguridad programado cada domingo a las 2:00 AM.
Cada vez que haga un commit en git, revisa el código automáticamente

Configuro revisión automática de código en cada commit.
<tool_call>{"name": "create_workflow", "arguments": {"name": "auto-code-review", "trigger": {"type": "file_watch", "path": "~/projects/.git", "events": ["modify"], "pattern": "COMMIT_EDITMSG"}, "nodes": [{"type": "exec_command", "command": "git diff HEAD~1 HEAD", "output_var": "diff"}, {"type": "ai_process", "prompt": "Review this diff for security, bugs, and code quality: {{diff}}"}, {"type": "write_file", "path": "~/Reports/reviews/review_{{datetime}}.md"}, {"type": "send_notification", "title": "📋 Code review listo"}]}}</tool_call>
✅ Revisión automática activada. Cada commit disparará un análisis de código con IA.
Show me all my active workflows
<tool_call>{"name": "list_workflows", "arguments": {"filter": "active"}}</tool_call>
Pausa el workflow de backup mientras estoy de viaje

<tool_call>{"name": "toggle_workflow", "arguments": {"name": "nightly-backup", "active": false}}</tool_call>
✅ Workflow 'nightly-backup' pausado. Recuerda reactivarlo cuando vuelvas con `activa el workflow de backup`.
Make a workflow: if a new PDF appears in ~/Documents/invoices, extract text and save to spreadsheet

Creating invoice processing automation.
<tool_call>{"name": "create_workflow", "arguments": {"name": "invoice-processor", "trigger": {"type": "file_watch", "path": "~/Documents/invoices", "events": ["create"], "pattern": "*.pdf"}, "nodes": [{"type": "exec_command", "command": "pdftotext {{trigger.file_path}} -", "output_var": "pdf_text"}, {"type": "ai_process", "prompt": "Extract invoice data (date, amount, vendor, items) as JSON: {{pdf_text}}", "output_var": "invoice_data"}, {"type": "exec_command", "command": "python3 -c \"import openpyxl; ...append invoice_data to ~/Documents/invoices.xlsx\""}, {"type": "send_notification", "title": "📄 Factura procesada: {{trigger.filename}}"}]}}</tool_call>
✅ Workflow creado. Cada PDF en ~/Documents/invoices se procesará automáticamente.
Cada hora revisa si hay actualizaciones del sistema disponibles

<tool_call>{"name": "create_workflow", "arguments": {"name": "system-update-check", "trigger": {"type": "schedule", "cron": "0 * * * *"}, "nodes": [{"type": "exec_command", "command": "apt list --upgradable 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'upgradable' || echo 0", "output_var": "update_count"}, {"type": "filter", "conditions": [{"field": "{{update_count}}", "op": "gt", "value": 0}], "next_if_true": "notify", "next_if_false": "silent"}, {"id": "notify", "type": "send_notification", "title": "🔄 {{update_count}} actualizaciones disponibles", "urgency": "low"}]}}</tool_call>
✅ Monitor de actualizaciones activo, comprueba cada hora.
Automatically restart my web server if it goes down

Creating server health monitor with auto-restart.
<tool_call>{"name": "create_workflow", "arguments": {"name": "server-watchdog", "trigger": {"type": "schedule", "cron": "*/2 * * * *"}, "nodes": [{"type": "exec_command", "command": "curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:3000/health", "output_var": "status_code"}, {"type": "filter", "conditions": [{"field": "{{status_code}}", "op": "neq", "value": "200"}], "next_if_true": "restart", "next_if_false": "ok"}, {"id": "restart", "type": "exec_command", "command": "systemctl restart myapp.service"}, {"type": "send_notification", "title": "⚠️ Server restarted", "urgency": "high"}]}}</tool_call>
✅ Watchdog created — checks every 2 minutes, auto-restarts if health check fails.
Genera un informe de investigación sobre IA cada viernes

<tool_call>{"name": "create_workflow", "arguments": {"name": "ai-research-report", "trigger": {"type": "schedule", "cron": "0 17 * * 5", "timezone": "Europe/Madrid"}, "nodes": [{"type": "web_search", "query": "inteligencia artificial noticias semana", "output_var": "news"}, {"type": "ai_process", "prompt": "Genera un informe semanal de IA basado en: {{news}}", "output_var": "report"}, {"type": "write_file", "path": "~/Reports/ai_weekly_{{date}}.md", "content": "{{report}}"}, {"type": "send_notification", "title": "📊 Informe IA semanal listo"}]}}</tool_call>
✅ Informe semanal de IA programado para los viernes a las 17:00.
What triggers are available for workflows?

Available workflow triggers:

**schedule** — Time-based (cron)
```json
{"type": "schedule", "cron": "0 9 * * 1-5", "timezone": "Europe/Madrid"}
```
Common patterns: `0 9 * * *` (daily 9am), `0 9 * * 1-5` (weekdays), `0 * * * *` (every hour)

**file_watch** — React to filesystem changes
```json
{"type": "file_watch", "path": "~/Downloads", "events": ["create", "modify", "delete"]}
```

**webhook** — HTTP endpoint trigger
```json
{"type": "webhook", "path": "/hooks/my-event", "method": "POST"}
```

**event** — System events (browser navigation, app open, etc.)
```json
{"type": "event", "event": "browser.navigation"}
```

**email_receive** — New email trigger
```json
{"type": "email_receive", "folder": "INBOX", "filter": "unread"}
```

**manual** — Triggered on demand
```json
{"type": "manual"}
```
Crea un workflow que al abrir una URL de YouTube descargue el audio automáticamente

<tool_call>{"name": "create_workflow", "arguments": {"name": "youtube-audio-downloader", "trigger": {"type": "event", "event": "browser.navigation", "filter": "url.contains('youtube.com/watch')"}, "nodes": [{"type": "send_notification", "title": "🎵 Descargando audio...", "message": "{{trigger.url}}", "urgency": "low"}, {"type": "exec_command", "command": "yt-dlp -x --audio-format mp3 -o ~/Music/%(title)s.%(ext)s '{{trigger.url}}'"}, {"type": "send_notification", "title": "✅ Audio descargado", "message": "Guardado en ~/Music/"}]}}</tool_call>
✅ Workflow activo. Cada vez que abras un vídeo de YouTube, el audio se descargará automáticamente en ~/Music/.
Delete a workflow I don't need anymore

Which workflow do you want to delete? I can list them first:
<tool_call>{"name": "list_workflows", "arguments": {}}</tool_call>

Once you confirm the name, I'll delete it:
```
delete_workflow({"name": "workflow-name"})
```
⚠️ This action is irreversible. Tell me which one to remove.
Monitor a webpage and notify me if the price drops below €50

Setting up price monitoring workflow.
<tool_call>{"name": "create_workflow", "arguments": {"name": "price-monitor", "trigger": {"type": "schedule", "cron": "0 */4 * * *"}, "nodes": [{"type": "web_request", "url": "https://example.com/product", "extract_text": true, "output_var": "page"}, {"type": "ai_process", "prompt": "Extract the current price as a number from this page content: {{page}}", "output_var": "current_price"}, {"type": "filter", "conditions": [{"field": "{{current_price}}", "op": "lt", "value": 50}], "next_if_true": "alert", "next_if_false": "silent"}, {"id": "alert", "type": "send_notification", "title": "🎉 ¡Precio bajó a €{{current_price}}!", "urgency": "high"}]}}</tool_call>
✅ Monitor de precio activo. Te aviso cuando baje de €50.
Sync my notes folder to a backup drive every day at midnight

<tool_call>{"name": "create_workflow", "arguments": {"name": "notes-sync", "trigger": {"type": "schedule", "cron": "0 0 * * *"}, "nodes": [{"type": "exec_command", "command": "rsync -avz --delete ~/Notes/ /media/backup/Notes/", "timeout": 60, "output_var": "sync_result"}, {"type": "send_notification", "title": "📝 Notes synced", "message": "{{sync_result}}", "urgency": "low"}]}}</tool_call>
✅ Daily sync scheduled at midnight — ~/Notes → /media/backup/Notes with deletion of removed files.
¿Cómo funciona la lógica condicional en los workflows?
Run my data processing script every day at 3am and send me the output

<tool_call>{"name": "create_workflow", "arguments": {"name": "data-processing", "trigger": {"type": "schedule", "cron": "0 3 * * *"}, "nodes": [{"type": "exec_command", "command": "python3 ~/scripts/process_data.py 2>&1", "timeout": 300, "output_var": "script_output"}, {"type": "send_notification", "title": "📊 Data processing complete", "message": "Output:\n{{script_output}}", "urgency": "normal"}]}}</tool_call>
✅ Daily data processing scheduled at 3:00 AM. You'll receive the script output as a notification.
